pieces.title: Within, Without
pieces.short_description: A flowing, wistful piece weaving together introspection and quiet forward movement.
pieces.long_description: In this composition, I sought to express my inner duality: a gentle curiosity that threads through quieter undercurrents of reflection. The minor key, A minor, was chosen for its poignant yet hopeful character, while the 6/8 meter allows both a lilting motion and a sense of contemplation. Two voices mirror my inner dialogue—the first voice carrying a searching, sometimes bittersweet melody; the second voice supporting and at times gently challenging it with counter-lines and subtle harmonic shifts. Dissonances bloom but never linger, resolving into open intervals that suggest acceptance as much as longing. The piece unfolds organically, unhurried but never still, embodying how I often feel: forward-looking, but rooted in questions and quiet wonder.
